sections.one_line: WTC v1’s position in the event-trigger and workflow execution pipeline
WTC v1 trigger package modules and their responsibilities
TriggerPredicate structure for event matching, temporal rules, and dispatch policy
Deterministic fire IDs that prevent duplicate trigger fires for the same predicate and window
FireOutbox CAS state machine for dispatch, failure, and startup recovery
EventSource protocol and production adapters for routing flushed events into runtime observation
Policy for handling multiple missed cron fires: skip, or emit one catch-up fire
Atomic workflow and trigger registration so workflows and triggers are installed together
Unified runtime heartbeat with one-time recovery sweep and tick failure isolation
Consumers and adapters that register workflows and triggers into the unified runtime
Legacy WTC v1 components replaced by the unified runtime and heartbeat model
